Chronology of every recorded fact about [[The Dragon Descends]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — The Dragon Descends is a technique used by Lindon.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Dragon Descends is a technique Lindon used at the end of his fourth-round match that is still unstable and takes too long to form.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — Lindon had previously beaten Sophara in simulations using The Dragon Descends.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon slammed the Dragon Descends technique into the Dreadgod's chest.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon condensed The Dragon Descends around his hand.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 11''' — Lindon's plan was to finish Northstrider with The Dragon Descends.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — The Dragon Descends is a technique used by Orthos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — The Dragon Descends technique has enough power to move the Dreadgod but requires fire aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 28''' — Malice caught The Dragon Descends on her armored forearm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — The Dragon Descends detonates and fills the world with Void authority.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
